vocab.example: For me, a watch is less about timekeeping and more of a versatile fashion accessory that complements my professional attire.

vocab.meaning: đồng hồ bấm giờ chính xác cao
vocab.example: I recently invested in a high-end chronometer because I value the precision and mechanical complexity of a traditional movement.

vocab.meaning: giá trị sử dụng thực tế
vocab.example: While smartphones are ubiquitous, a wristwatch provides a level of functional utility that allows me to check the time discreetly during meetings.
I prefer a minimalist watch design as it exudes a sense of understated sophistication without being overly flashy.

vocab.meaning: cỗ máy thời gian (cách gọi trang trọng của đồng hồ)
vocab.example: A classic timepiece is one of the few items of jewelry that truly stands the test of time in a man's wardrobe.
